sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9981" key="a)ntikatadu/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντικατα-δύομαι</orth>, <sense id="n9981.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">stoop down in turn</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in opposition,</tr_> Ach Tat.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1431.tlg001:6:18" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.18</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
